mapper.select: SELECT PARAM_VAL FROM SYS_PARAMETER WHERE PARAM_CD = 'CUSTOMS_LAST_TIME'

SELECT ID, TO_CHAR(CREATE_TIME,'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi:ss') CREATE_TIME, BILL_TYPE, CARGO_INFO_NO, BUSINESS_NO, TO_CHAR(START_TIME,'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi:ss') START_TIME, TO_CHAR(END_TIME,'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi:ss') END_TIME, SCN, SHIP_NAME, VOYAGE, TRADE_TYPE, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_NAME, PACKING_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, STOREHOUSE_NAME, REGION_NAME FROM V_CUSTOMS WHERE CREATE_TIME between to_date(#{lastTime},'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi:ss') and to_date(#{currentTime},'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi:ss') or TRUCK_MAX_TIME between to_date(#{lastTime},'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi:ss') and to_date(#{currentTime},'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi:ss')

SELECT ID, VEHICLE_NO as TRUCK_NO, DRIVER_NAME_ONE AS DRIVER, DRIVER_PHONE_ONE AS TEL, DRIVER_NO_ONE AS ID_NUMBER, PLAN_START_TIME AS START_TIME, PLAN_END_TIME AS END_TIME FROM T_BUS_VEHICLE_RESERVATION WHERE PLAN_NO = #{planNo}

SELECT ID, EQUIPMENT_NO AS TRUCK_NO, 'null' AS DRIVER, 'null' AS TEL, 'null' AS ID_NUMBER, TO_CHAR(START_TIME,'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi:ss') START_TIME, TO_CHAR(END_TIME,'YYYY-MM-DD hh24:mi:ss') END_TIME FROM T_BUS_VEHICLE_TRANSFER WHERE TRUST_CARGO_ID = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from TOS_PLAN where auto_id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT A.SHIPVOYAGE_ID SHIPVOYAGE_ID, A.SHIP_NAME SHIP_NAME, A.VOYAGE VOYAGE, A.CARGO_OWNER_NAME CARGO_OWNER_NAME, b.SCN SCN FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO A LEFT JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE b ON b."ID" = A.SHIPVOYAGE_ID WHERE A.ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TOS_PLAN( AUTO_ID, SCN, BIZ_TYPE, IC_CARD, TRAF_NAME, TRAF_CODE, VOYAGE_NO, TRADE_NAME, GOODS_NAME, BILL_NO, ENTRY_ID, CAR_NO, PACK_NO, GOODS_TYPE, GOODS_V, GOODS_WT, GROSS_WT, TARE_WT, ISINVALID, INFORM_NO )VALUES ( #{autoId}, #{scn}, #{bizType}, #{icCard}, #{trafName}, #{trafCode}, #{voyageNo}, #{tradeName}, #{goodsName}, #{billNo}, #{entryId}, #{carNo}, #{packNo}, #{goodsType}, #{goodsV}, #{goodsWt}, #{grossWt}, #{tareWt}, #{isinvalid}, #{informNo} )
